# StarHalf

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::StarHalf;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        StarHalf { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
bookmark, favorite, like, review, rating

social, multimedia
